title: Correctly handle unpacked array typedefs for ports

features.name: typedef with unpacked array using localparam dimensions as port type
features.description: Code should include a typedef that wraps an unpacked array where the array dimensions use localparam expressions from the typedef's scope, and a module port using this typedef where the module also declares localparams with the same names

features.name: nested unpacked array typedefs
features.description: Code should include nested typedefs where an unpacked array typedef references another unpacked array typedef, creating multiple levels of type indirection

features.name: port direction and type separation with array typedef
features.description: Code should include a module port where direction and type are separately declared, and the type is a typedef containing unpacked array dimensions that must be distinguished from additional port declaration array dimensions
